    SELECT "r"."Id", "r"."BookingReference", "r"."CheckInDate", "r"."CheckOutDate", "r"."CreatedAt", "r"."GuestId", "r"."HotelId", "r"."RoomId", "r"."Source", "r"."Status", "r"."TotalAmount"

    ORDER BY "r"."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @__p_0
) AS "t"
INNER JOIN "Guests" AS "g" ON "t"."GuestId" = "g"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Hotels" AS "h" ON "t"."HotelId" = "h"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Rooms" AS "r0" ON "t"."RoomId" = "r0"."Id"

FROM (
    SELECT "r"."Id", "r"."BookingReference", "r"."CheckInDate", "r"."CheckOutDate", "r"."CreatedAt", "r"."GuestId", "r"."HotelId", "r"."RoomId", "r"."Source", "r"."Status", "r"."TotalAmount"

    ORDER BY "r"."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @__p_0
) AS "t"
INNER JOIN "Guests" AS "g" ON "t"."GuestId" = "g"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Hotels" AS "h" ON "t"."HotelId" = "h"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Rooms" AS "r0" ON "t"."RoomId" = "r0"."Id"
ORDER BY "t"."CreatedAt" DESC

WHERE rtrim(rtrim(strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%f', "r"."CheckOutDate", 'start of day'), '0'), '.') = @__targetDate_Date_0 AND "r"."Status" <> 3

FROM (
    SELECT "r"."Id", "r"."BookingReference", "r"."CheckInDate", "r"."CheckOutDate", "r"."CreatedAt", "r"."GuestId", "r"."HotelId", "r"."RoomId", "r"."Source", "r"."Status", "r"."TotalAmount"
    FROM "Reservations" AS "r"
    ORDER BY "r"."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @__p_0
) AS "t"
INNER JOIN "Guests" AS "g" ON "t"."GuestId" = "g"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Hotels" AS "h" ON "t"."HotelId" = "h"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Rooms" AS "r0" ON "t"."RoomId" = "r0"."Id"
ORDER BY "t"."CreatedAt" DESC

FROM "Reservations" AS "r"

2025-12-30 20:44:03.921 +01:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (0ms) [Parameters=[@__toDate_0='?' (DbType = DateTime), @__fromDate_1='?' (DbType = DateTime)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT "r"."Id", "r"."BookingReference", "r"."CheckInDate", "r"."CheckOutDate", "r"."CreatedAt", "r"."GuestId", "r"."HotelId", "r"."InternalNotes", "r"."NumberOfGuests", "r"."RoomId", "r"."Source", "r"."SpecialRequests", "r"."Status", "r"."TotalAmount", "r"."UpdatedAt", "h"."Id", "h"."Address", "h"."CreatedAt", "h"."Email", "h"."IsActive", "h"."Name", "h"."Phone", "h"."UpdatedAt", "r0"."Id", "r0"."BaseRate", "r0"."Capacity", "r0"."CreatedAt", "r0"."Description", "r0"."HotelId", "r0"."RoomNumber", "r0"."Status", "r0"."Type", "r0"."UpdatedAt", "g"."Id", "g"."Address", "g"."CreatedAt", "g"."DocumentNumber", "g"."Email", "g"."FirstName", "g"."LastName", "g"."Phone", "g"."UpdatedAt"
FROM "Reservations" AS "r"
INNER JOIN "Rooms" AS "r0" ON "r"."RoomId" = "r0"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Hotels" AS "h" ON "r"."HotelId" = "h"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Guests" AS "g" ON "r"."GuestId" = "g"."Id"

2025-12-30 20:44:34.825 +01:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (0ms) [Parameters=[@__toDate_0='?' (DbType = DateTime), @__fromDate_1='?' (DbType = DateTime)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT "r"."Id", "r"."BookingReference", "r"."CheckInDate", "r"."CheckOutDate", "r"."CreatedAt", "r"."GuestId", "r"."HotelId", "r"."InternalNotes", "r"."NumberOfGuests", "r"."RoomId", "r"."Source", "r"."SpecialRequests", "r"."Status", "r"."TotalAmount", "r"."UpdatedAt", "h"."Id", "h"."Address", "h"."CreatedAt", "h"."Email", "h"."IsActive", "h"."Name", "h"."Phone", "h"."UpdatedAt", "r0"."Id", "r0"."BaseRate", "r0"."Capacity", "r0"."CreatedAt", "r0"."Description", "r0"."HotelId", "r0"."RoomNumber", "r0"."Status", "r0"."Type", "r0"."UpdatedAt", "g"."Id", "g"."Address", "g"."CreatedAt", "g"."DocumentNumber", "g"."Email", "g"."FirstName", "g"."LastName", "g"."Phone", "g"."UpdatedAt"
FROM "Reservations" AS "r"
INNER JOIN "Rooms" AS "r0" ON "r"."RoomId" = "r0"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Hotels" AS "h" ON "r"."HotelId" = "h"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Guests" AS "g" ON "r"."GuestId" = "g"."Id"
